app_release_notes: v1.5.2 - Athlon Rangecraft Velocity Pro files now import. If Loadscope was turning your Athlon exports away with "no matching parser," that is fixed. Range files also line up in the right order now when a chronograph file carries no time stamp -- file 9 comes before file 10 -- which keeps your velocities on the right charges. Tidier menus: Support went from 14 items to 9, and Check for Updates now sits next to About with your version shown underneath.
